candidate_definition_hints.text: GOV.UK staff use this repository as a forum to discuss and make technical decisions

GOV.UK staff use this repository as a forum to discuss and make technical decisions. The outcomes of these discussions can be either an action plan, or a new standard that GOV.UK should follow. This repository is open as a reference for other teams within GDS and wider governmen…
